title: Pan-Seared Mediterranean Chicken
description: A flavorful and healthy Mediterranean-inspired dish made with pan-seared chicken, rich and savory sauce, and topped with crunchy pistachios.
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the chicken breasts and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
3. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
4. Add the garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
5. Add the Mediterranean stir-fry sauce to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
6. Return the chicken to the skillet and coat with the sauce.
7. Sprinkle the pistachios over the top of the chicken and serve hot.
